message:
feat: vertical card resize, cluster AI button, mission rollback (#6313, #6454, #6463) (#6977)

* feat: add vertical card resize via height menu in card wrapper (#6463)

Add HEIGHT_OPTIONS to CardWrapper with Compact/Default/Tall/Extra Tall
presets (1-4 row spans). Wire onHeightChange callback through all
dashboard components (SharedSortableCard, CustomDashboard, Dashboard,
DashboardPage, DashboardRuntime, DashboardComponents) and the
useDashboardCards hook (updateCardHeight). Height is persisted via the
same card position model as width.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add Create Cluster with AI mission button in clusters dashboard (#6454)

Add a purple "Create Cluster with AI" button in the My Clusters
dashboard that starts an AI mission to guide the user through creating
a new cluster on any provider (kind, k3d, EKS, GKE, AKS, OpenShift).
Uses the existing mission infrastructure with API key check.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add rollback button for failed/cancelled AI missions (#6313)

Add a Rollback button (undo icon) on MissionListItem for missions with
failed or cancelled status. Clicking it opens a confirm dialog, then
starts a new repair-type mission that summarizes the interrupted
mission's actions and asks the AI to analyze the cluster state and
safely reverse partial changes with user confirmation.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -7,29 +7,41 @@ import {
   StopCircle,
   Loader2,
   Satellite,
+  Undo2,
 } from 'lucide-react'
 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
 import type { Mission } from '../../../hooks/useMissions'
 import { cn } from '../../../lib/cn'
 import { ConfirmDialog } from '../../../lib/modals'
 import { STATUS_CONFIG, TYPE_ICONS } from './types'
 
-export function MissionListItem({ mission, isActive, onClick, onDismiss, onExpand, onTerminate, isCollapsed, onToggleCollapse }: {
+/** Mission statuses that indicate the mission was interrupted or failed and may need rollback */
+const ROLLBACK_ELIGIBLE_STATUSES = new Set(['failed', 'cancelled'])
+
+export function MissionListItem({ mission, isActive, onClick, onDismiss, onExpand, onTerminate, onRollback, isCollapsed, onToggleCollapse }: {
   mission: Mission
   isActive: boolean
   onClick: () => void
   onDismiss: () => void
   onExpand: () => void
   onTerminate?: () => void
+  /** Start a rollback mission to reverse changes made by this failed/cancelled mission */
+  onRollback?: (mission: Mission) => void
   isCollapsed: boolean
   onToggleCollapse: () => void
 }) {
   const { t } = useTranslation()
   const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false)
+  const [showRollbackConfirm, setShowRollbackConfirm] = useState(false)
   const config = STATUS_CONFIG[mission.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.pending
   const StatusIcon = config.icon
   const TypeIcon = TYPE_ICONS[mission.type] || TYPE_ICONS.custom
 
+  /** Whether this mission is eligible for rollback (failed or cancelled with a non-trivial history) */
+  const canRollback = onRollback &&
+    ROLLBACK_ELIGIBLE_STATUSES.has(mission.status) &&
+    (mission.messages || []).length > 0
+
   return (
     <>
     <ConfirmDialog

+        onRollback?.(mission)

+      confirmLabel="Rollback"
+      variant="warning"
+    />

       className={cn(
         'w-full text-left rounded-lg transition-colors',
@@ -90,6 +114,17 @@ export function MissionListItem({ mission, isActive, onClick, onDismiss, onExpan
             <StopCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-red-400 hover:text-red-300" />
           </button>
         )}
+        {/* Rollback button for failed/cancelled missions (#6313) */}
+        {canRollback && (
+          <button
+            onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setShowRollbackConfirm(true) }}
+            className="p-0.5 hover:bg-orange-500/20 rounded transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
+            title={t('layout.missionSidebar.rollbackMission')}
+            data-testid="rollback-mission-btn"
+          >
+            <Undo2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-orange-400 hover:text-orange-300" />
+          </button>
+        )}
         <button
           onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onExpand() }}
           className="p-0.5 hover:bg-secondary/50 rounded transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
